name: ainews-pipeline
description: End-to-end AI-news content automation: RSS -> score -> article -> podcast -> video -> publish to WeChat MP / Ximalaya / Douyin.

conda_python.title: Python interpreter (optional)
conda_python.description: Absolute path to Python (conda/miniconda). Leave blank to use 'python' on PATH.

ffmpeg_path.title: FFmpeg executable (optional)
ffmpeg_path.description: Absolute path to ffmpeg. Leave blank to use 'ffmpeg' on PATH.

font_path.title: CJK font file (optional)
font_path.description: Path to a CJK-capable .ttc/.ttf for video subtitles (e.g. msyh.ttc on Windows). Leave blank for auto-detect.
